holdings.infoBox: MFDX is an equity ETF with a total of 1303 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 0.97%, Novartis AG at 0.90%, Tokyo Electron at 0.89%, Offset: Cash at 0.89%, and Banco Santander at 0.84%.

overview.description: The PIMCO RAFI Dynamic Multi-Factor International Equity ETF (MFDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an international, developed-market equity index that selects securities according to a combination of fundamental and technical factors. MFDX was launched on Aug 31, 2017 and is issued by PIMCO.
infoTable: RAFI Dynamic Multi-Factor Developed Ex-U.S. Index
